creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for the report. This port is broken because the master site (GOOGLE_CODE) has gone away. Would you like to take maintainership of this port and unbreak it? That would require a working upstream repository.

Gentoo's portage lists this as upstream, if that is even the same cmd5checkpw, I don't know:

* http://www.fehcom.de/qmail/smtpauth.html
